# D-Law AI

> Global legal information assistant. Ask about laws in any of 195 countries and get clear, neutral, plain-language explanations — for educational purposes, not legal advice.

D-Law AI lets users pick a country and legal category, then ask a question. Answers are structured (summary, key rules, exceptions, references) and written for non-lawyers. A library of legal document templates provides structured starters for common tasks.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Pick a country and legal category, then ask D-Law AI a legal question.
- [Templates](/templates): Library of common legal document templates — immigration letters, contract termination, NDAs, leases, wills, power of attorney, GDPR DPAs.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account to start a conversation.
